whyItMatters: Claude Code creator, Boris Cherny: "Fable 5 does in a day what used to take teams a month. Most people are still using it wrong." In 12 minutes he breaks down why Fable 5 needs less prompting than any model before, and why the habits that worked yesterday now slow you down. Watch it, then read the guide below on everything Fable 5 can actually do. · fxtwitt…
